title_readme_score_how_good_is.en: README Score — How Good Is Your README?

metadesc_paste_your_readme_md_and.en: Paste your README.md and get a quality score. 16 checks based on open source best practices. Free, instant, no signup.

subtitle_16_checks_based_on_open_s.en: 16 checks based on open source best practices. Paste your README and see.

metadesc_quick_reference_regex_che.en: Quick-reference regex cheatsheet with searchable patterns. Covers character classes, quantifiers, anchors, groups, and lookaheads with examples.

subtitle_searchable_reference_for.en: Searchable reference for regular expressions — click any card to copy the pattern

subtitle_matches_a_pattern_only_if.en: Matches a pattern only if it's preceded by another pattern. The lookbehind itself is zero-width: it doesn't consume characters.

subtitle_matches_only_if_not_prece.en: Matches only if NOT preceded by the given pattern.

subtitle_automated_tests_for_regex.en: Automated tests for regex edge cases. Tests run in your browser to verify actual engine behavior.

metadesc_quick_reference_for_regul.en: Quick reference for regular expression syntax. Covers anchors, character classes, quantifiers, groups, lookahead/lookbehind, and common patterns.

subtitle_common_regular_expression.en: Common regular expression syntax and patterns

title_regex_replace_find_replac.en: Regex Replace — Find & Replace with Regular Expressions

metadesc_find_and_replace_with_reg.en: Find and replace with regex. Live diff preview with deletions and replacements highlighted, 10 presets, backreferences, regex quick reference.

subtitle_find_replace_with_regular.en: Find & replace with regular expressions — live diff preview, backreferences, 10 presets.

title_regex_test_live_regular_e.en: Regex Test — Live Regular Expression Tester

metadesc_test_regular_expressions.en: Test regular expressions in real-time. See matches highlighted, capture groups, and match details. Common patterns included. Free, instant.

subtitle_live_regular_expression_t.en: Live regular expression tester. Type and see matches instantly.

title_regex_visualizer_visual_r.en: Regex Visualizer — Visual Regular Expression Explainer

metadesc_visualize_and_explain_reg.en: Visualize and explain regular expressions. Match highlighting, group capture, replace mode. Quick reference. Email, URL, date presets.

subtitle_visualize_and_explain_reg.en: Visualize and explain regular expressions step by step

metadesc_interactive_browser_rende.en: Interactive browser rendering pipeline visualizer. See which CSS/JS changes trigger Layout, Paint, or Composite. Step through the pipeline: Parse → Style → Layout → Paint → Composite.

placeholder_search_css_properties_e_g.en: Search CSS properties... (e.g., transform, width, color)

title_repo_compare_side_by_side.en: Repo Compare — Side-by-Side GitHub Repository Comparison

metadesc_compare_two_github_reposi.en: Compare two GitHub repositories side by side. Stars, forks, issues, languages, commit activity, and more.

subtitle_side_by_side_github_repos.en: Side-by-side GitHub repository comparison. Stars, forks, issues, languages, and more.

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Reporting API - ReportingObserver, report types, Report-To header builder, NEL overview, and real-time report viewer.

subtitle_create_a_reportingobserve.en: Create a ReportingObserver to capture deprecation and intervention reports generated by the browser.

subtitle_these_actions_may_trigger.en: These actions may trigger deprecation or intervention reports in supporting browsers.

subtitle_overview_of_all_report_ty.en: Overview of all report types supported by the Reporting API ecosystem.

subtitle_build_the_report_to_and_r.en: Build the Report-To and Reporting-Endpoints HTTP response headers for server-side report collection.

subtitle_view_captured_reports_wit.en: View captured reports with filtering. Reports from the ReportingObserver appear here in real-time.

subtitle_nel_uses_the_reporting_ap.en: NEL uses the Reporting API infrastructure to report network-level errors. Configured via HTTP headers.

label_buffered_include_reports.en: Buffered (include reports generated before observer was created)

jtc_you_can_capture_deprecati.en: You can capture deprecation and intervention reports.

jtc_requires_chrome_edge_69_r.en: Requires Chrome/Edge 69+. Report-To headers work server-side in all browsers.

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for requestIdleCallback API - visualize idle deadlines, task queues, and cooperative scheduling patterns.
Interactive playground for ResizeObserver API - visualize element resizing, breakpoint detection, and responsive component patterns.

metadesc_interactive_resize_observ.en: Interactive Resize Observer playground. Resize elements and see contentRect, borderBoxSize, contentBoxSize in real-time. Working code export.

title_responsive_breakpoints_me.en: Responsive Breakpoints — Media Query Manager & Visualizer

metadesc_manage_responsive_breakpo.en: Manage responsive breakpoints visually. Bootstrap, Tailwind, Material Design presets. Generate CSS media queries, SCSS mixins, Tailwind config.

metadesc_paste_your_claude_md_and.en: Paste your CLAUDE.md and instantly detect dangerous commands, exposed secrets, and risky configurations. Free, client-side only.

h2_get_the_full_claude_code.en: Get the Full Claude Code Ops Kit

h2_one_unprotected_developer.en: One unprotected developer is the whole org's risk

metadesc_generate_robots_txt_files.en: Generate robots.txt files visually. Configure rules for Googlebot, Bingbot, and other crawlers. Sitemap URL. Copy or download.

metadesc_decode_microsoft_defender.en: Decode Microsoft Defender, Google Safe Browsing, and other URL protection safelinks to reveal the original destination URL.

label_paste_a_safelink_url_or_r.en: Paste a safelink URL or raw encoded URL

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Screen Orientation API. Explore orientation types, angles, lock modes, and change events in real time.

subtitle_live_updating_display_inf.en: Live-updating display information. Resize your browser to see changes.
